trajectory.behavior: The malware is a spreader that uses Adobe products to execute its payload. It communicates with a C2 server, drops files, and has several capabilities, including calculating modulo 256, delaying execution, allocating memory, terminating processes, and checking for time delays. It also has the ability to write files on Windows.

TTPs: T1562.001: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools (Windows Defender)

It also has the ability to write files on Windows.
